objective: Expose actionability metrics and prevent stale, unknown-panel, missing-selector, or unsupported safe-looking defects from leaking into candidate operations.
implemented_behaviors: quality_defect_ledger emits actionability_metrics for safe_candidate, candidate_supported, unsupported_safe, unknown_panel, stale_detector_evidence, and missing_selector_hash buckets.
Detector reports without recorded source_hashes are marked stale and cannot become candidate_supported.
Detector reports with source_hashes that differ from current fixture source hashes are marked stale and cannot become candidate_supported.
Safe-looking defects whose target.panel is missing, unknown, or not declared in spec.yaml are blocked with the unknown_panel actionability gap.
Line-bound defects carry selector_text_hash when a concrete source line is available; missing selector hashes block candidate support.
Candidate generation refuses stale_detector_evidence, unknown_panel, and missing_selector_hash actionability gaps instead of falling back to the first offsettable line.
Panel-family candidate generation requires explicit panel/family input and panel-bound selectors rather than whole-file first-coordinate fallback.

tests.command: uv run pytest tests/test_quality_defect_ledger.py tests/test_candidate_generator.py tests/test_candidate_families.py

uv run ruff check tests/test_quality_defect_ledger.py tests/test_candidate_generator.py tests/test_candidate_families.py scripts/quality/quality_defect_ledger.py scripts/candidates/candidate_generator.py scripts/candidates/candidate_families.py
uv run python -m py_compile scripts/quality/quality_defect_ledger.py scripts/candidates/candidate_generator.py scripts/candidates/candidate_families.py

adversarial_verification.summary: No blocking findings. Reviewer verified missing or mismatched detector source_hashes become stale, undeclared panels become unknown_panel, candidate generation refuses actionability gaps, and panel-family generation avoids blind fallback.

tooling_notes.summary: Previously unavailable in this environment: uv run basedpyright failed to spawn basedpyright.
rg --files -g 'check-no-excuse-rules.py' returned no matching script in this repository.
Phase-owned Python files exceed the generic 250 pure-LOC advisory, but this phase intentionally avoided a broad structural refactor outside the approved Phase 1 scope.
